added.initialPrompt: Analyze this newly added code and evaluate its immediate impact.

modified.initialPrompt: Identify the core logic change. Was this a refactor or a behavioral change?
questions: Are the state assumptions still valid?

removed.initialPrompt: Summarize what was removed and verify if any upstream consumers will be broken.

unchanged.initialPrompt: Provide a high-level summary of this existing baseline component.

hunk.initialPrompt: This is a direct git patch diff representing an atomic edit.
questions: Can you explain this patch hunks logic?

symbol.initialPrompt: This is a resolved semantic symbol (function/class).

questions: What is the main purpose of this file?

module.initialPrompt: This is a top level module directory.
questions: What domain logic relies on this module?

external_ref.initialPrompt: This references an external/out-of-bound system resource.
questions: How is this external resource accessed?
